lifecycle.title: Design & engineering
lifecycle.description: Ergonomic design optimized for long sitting sessions and easy disassembly.

lifecycle.title: Material sourcing
lifecycle.description: Oak sourced from FSC-certified forests in Sweden.

lifecycle.title: Manufacturing
lifecycle.description: Manufactured in energy-efficient facility with 40% renewable energy share.

lifecycle.title: Distribution
lifecycle.description: Shipped flat-packed to minimize transport volume.

circularity.recyclability: Wood and metal parts are separable and recyclable
circularity.notes: Seat and backrest can be replaced individually. All fasteners are standard metric sizes.

products.name: Urban Modular Sofa
products.material: Steel frame, FSC plywood, recycled polyester fabric
products.warranty: 10 years on frame, 3 years on upholstery

lifecycle.title: Concept & modular design
lifecycle.description: Modular layout allows replacement of individual modules and covers.

lifecycle.title: Frame production
lifecycle.description: High-strength steel frame with powder coating for durability.

lifecycle.title: Upholstery & assembly
lifecycle.description: Covers sewn from recycled polyester fabric with removable zippers.

circularity.recyclability: Frame and modules can be separated; covers are fully removable
circularity.notes: All modules can be reconfigured; spare covers available.
